testDescription: [adversarial] NEGOTIATE_PAYMENT route_to='advisor' — advisor extracts: consultAcc='', maxPayment=1000

input.narrative: The user rejected the advisor's proposed restructuring plan with a 4,500 THB monthly payment, stating it is too high. They have counter-proposed a 1,000 THB monthly payment with a permanent zero-interest rate. Routing back to the advisor to handle the negotiation and revise the plan.
